ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., TF-IDF, BERT_CLS) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Clustering, Classification) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Model version */,
  "model_configuration" TEXT /* Model configuration details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Dataset version */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "ARI" REAL /* Adjusted Rand Index (ARI) */,
  "AMI" REAL /* Adjusted Mutual Information (AMI) */,
  "NMI" REAL /* Normalized Mutual Information (NMI) */,
  "MI" REAL /* Mutual Information (MI) */,
  "homogeneity" REAL /* Homogeneity score */,
  "completeness" REAL /* Completeness score */,
  "evaluated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed user password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the object */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "accessed_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed object (model or dataset) */,
  "accessed_object_type" TEXT /* Type of the accessed object (model or dataset) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accessed_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_object_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accessed_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_object_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Dataset version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
